title: 10 best herbal tinctures for hair fall
description: Stinging nettle tinctures helps with hair fall because of its unique ability to promote blood circulation, strengthen hair follicles, and reduce inflammation in the scalp. The anti-inflammatory properties of stinging nettle help to soothe an itchy scalp, reducing dandruff and flaking that can cause hair loss.
